recommended_actions.title: [Tech Debt] Migrate dashboard class/connect patterns to hooks
recommended_actions.what: Dashboard feature has 10 class components, 9 connect() usages, and 26 files with explicit any.
recommended_actions.why: High debt in a top-churn area; this is the highest-priority modernization candidate.
recommended_actions.how: Use migrate-class-components skill for class/connect conversion, then tighten typing incrementally.

recommended_actions.title: [Tech Debt] Modernize Explore TraceView legacy React patterns
recommended_actions.what: TraceView subtree contains 4 class components, 7 stylesFactory usages, and 1 unsafe lifecycle call sites.
recommended_actions.why: Concentrated legacy React debt in a bounded subtree enables efficient batch modernization.
recommended_actions.how: Migrate class components + stylesFactory to hooks/useStyles2 and remove unsafe lifecycle methods.

recommended_actions.title: [Tech Debt] Split oversized Go files in high-churn services
recommended_actions.what: There are 78 non-test Go files over 800 LOC; largest include pkg/tests/apis/provisioning/common/testing.go (2835), pkg/services/featuremgmt/registry.go (2828), pkg/apimachinery/utils/meta_mock.go (2779).
recommended_actions.why: Large files increase review cost and regression risk, especially in actively touched packages.
recommended_actions.how: Extract cohesive submodules by responsibility (registry slices, service helpers, API handlers).

recommended_actions.title: [Tech Debt] Migrate IsEnabled API call sites to OpenFeature
recommended_actions.what: Old IsEnabled/IsEnabledGlobally APIs are still used in 162 files; deprecated toggles in registry: 3.
recommended_actions.why: Deprecated toggle APIs create long-term compatibility risk and block full OpenFeature adoption.
recommended_actions.how: Follow pkg/services/featuremgmt migration path and replace call sites package-by-package.

recommended_actions.title: [Tech Debt] Reduce explicit any in top TypeScript hotspots
recommended_actions.what: Explicit any appears 393 times across 137 files; top offenders: public/app/features/dashboard/state/DashboardModel.ts (23), public/app/core/time_series2.ts (19), public/app/plugins/datasource/opentsdb/datasource.ts (16), public/app/features/dashboard/state/DashboardMigrator.ts (16), public/app/features/dashboard/state/PanelModel.ts (13).
recommended_actions.why: High any density limits static guarantees and complicates refactors in frequently changed areas.
recommended_actions.how: Prioritize top offenders and replace any with domain types/unknown + narrowing guards.

recommended_actions.title: [Tech Debt] Migrate datasource plugin class components
recommended_actions.what: Datasource plugins still contain 12 class-based React components.
recommended_actions.why: Plugin maintenance cost remains high due to divergent legacy patterns and workspace-specific code.
recommended_actions.how: Convert plugin editors incrementally during plugin maintenance cycles, prioritizing high churn plugins.
